mapper.sql: select a.ghjf_id, a.spuuid, djxh, shxydm, nsrmc, nsrjc, dept_id, ghjgxzjb, clghbj, hyghbz, sdghjg_dm, sdghjgxzjb, zgswj_dm, zgswskfj_dm, ssgly_dm, ghlb_dm, xtlb_dm, zzjglx_dm, hy_dm, djzclx_dm, dwlsgx_dm, sblb_dm, nssbrq, pzxh, pzmxxh, skssqq, skssqz, zsswjg_dm, skssswjg_dm, skgk_dm, dzsphm, pzzl_dm, pzzg_dm, pzhm, kpy_dm, kpy_xm, zspm_dm, zszm_dm, yskm_dm, gzze, sl, ynse, jmse, yjse, ybtse, jkfs_dm, jfhb, jfzh, jfhm, jfhh, jfyh, rkrq, jsbj, jsrq, jsczy, jcghzh, jcghhm, jcghhh, jcghbl, jcghje, cbjzh, cbjhm, cbjhh, cbjbl, cbjje, hyghzh, hyghhm, hyghhh, hyghbl, hyghje, xjghzh, xjghhm, xjghhh, xjghbl, xjghje, sjghzh, sjghhm, sjghhh, sjghbl, sjghje, szghzh, szghhm, szghhh, szghbl, szghje, qgghzh, qgghhm, qgghhh, qgghbl, qgghje, jcjzh, jcjhm, jcjhh, jcjbl, jcjje, jcwsh, sdszh, sdshm, sdshh, sdsbl, sdsje, swjgzh, swjghm, swjghh, swjgbl, swjgje, cbjthbj, cbjthrq, cbjthczy, jym, hkpch, bluuid, sdghzh, sdghhm, sdghhh, sdghbl, sdghje, b.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, b.sfbje, b.fbbj, b.fbrq, b.zjxcrq, b.hkpzh, b.bz from cbjtz a left join cxtj_cbjqrfb b on b.ghjf_id = a.ghjf_id

select a.ghjf_id, a.spuuid, djxh, shxydm, nsrmc, nsrjc, dept_id, ghjgxzjb, clghbj, hyghbz, sdghjg_dm, sdghjgxzjb, zgswj_dm, zgswskfj_dm, ssgly_dm, ghlb_dm, xtlb_dm, zzjglx_dm, hy_dm, djzclx_dm, dwlsgx_dm, sblb_dm, nssbrq, pzxh, pzmxxh, skssqq, skssqz, zsswjg_dm, skssswjg_dm, skgk_dm, dzsphm, pzzl_dm, pzzg_dm, pzhm, kpy_dm, kpy_xm, zspm_dm, zszm_dm, yskm_dm, gzze, sl, ynse, jmse, yjse, ybtse, jkfs_dm, jfhb, jfzh, jfhm, jfhh, jfyh, rkrq, jsbj, jsrq, jsczy, jcghzh, jcghhm, jcghhh, jcghbl, jcghje, cbjzh, cbjhm, cbjhh, cbjbl, cbjje, hyghzh, hyghhm, hyghhh, hyghbl, hyghje, xjghzh, xjghhm, xjghhh, xjghbl, xjghje, sjghzh, sjghhm, sjghhh, sjghbl, sjghje, szghzh, szghhm, szghhh, szghbl, szghje, qgghzh, qgghhm, qgghhh, qgghbl, qgghje, jcjzh, jcjhm, jcjhh, jcjbl, jcjje, jcwsh, sdszh, sdshm, sdshh, sdsbl, sdsje, swjgzh, swjghm, swjghh, swjgbl, swjgje, cbjthbj, cbjthrq, cbjthczy, jym, hkpch, bluuid, sdghzh, sdghhm, sdghhh, sdghbl, sdghje, b.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, b.sfbje, b.fbbj, b.fbrq, b.zjxcrq, b.hkpzh, b.bz from gh_jf a left join cxtj_cbjqrfb b on b.ghjf_id = a.ghjf_id
mapper.insert:
insert into cxtj_cbjqrfb (ghjf_id, spuuid, sfbje, fbbj, fbrq, hkpzh, bz, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
(#{item.ghjfId}, #{item.spuuid}, #{item.sfbje}, 'Y', #{item.fbrq}, #{item.hkpzh}, #{item.bz}, #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.updateBy}, now())
on duplicate key update spuuid = values(spuuid), sfbje = values(sfbje), fbbj = 'Y', fbrq = values(fbrq), hkpzh = values(hkpzh), bz = values(bz), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update:
update gh_jf set cbjthbj = 'Z', cbjthczy = #{updateBy}, cbjthrq = now(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where ghjf_id in
#{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from cxtj_cbjqrfb where ghjf_id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into cxtj_cbjqrfb (ghjf_id, spuuid, sfbje, fbrq, fbbj, zjxcrq, hkpzh, bz, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
(#{item.ghjfId}, #{item.spuuid}, #{item.sfbje}, #{item.fbrq}, 'Y', #{item.zjxcrq}, #{item.hkpzh}, #{item.bz}, #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.updateBy}, now())
on duplicate key update spuuid = values(spuuid), sfbje = values(sfbje), fbrq = values(fbrq), fbbj = 'Y', zjxcrq = values(zjxcrq), hkpzh = values(hkpzh), bz = values(bz), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update: update gh_jf set cbjthbj = 'Z', cbjthczy = #{updateBy}, cbjthrq = now(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where ghjf_id = #{ghjfId}
